aepedia-desc: School wiki management: email allowlist for registration and group-based page access.
aepedia-allowlist-intro: Uploading a new CSV entirely replaces the current allowlist. Accounts whose email is removed will be blocked immediately (except members of aep_external). Accounts whose email is re-added will be unblocked automatically.
aepedia-allowlist-csv-label: CSV content — one email per line, header row ignored:
aepedia-allowlist-confirm: This will replace the entire allowlist. Continue?
aepedia-allowlist-success: Allowlist updated: $1 added, $2 removed. $3 account(s) blocked, $4 account(s) unblocked.
aepedia-allowlist-error-empty: No valid email addresses found in the CSV.
aepedia-groups-intro: Select a group and upload a CSV containing all member emails. This entirely replaces the current membership for that group. Members not in the new list will have the group removed from their account immediately.
aepedia-groups-csv-label: CSV content — one email per line, header row ignored:
aepedia-groups-confirm: This will replace the entire membership for the selected group. Continue?
aepedia-groups-success: Group $1 updated: $2 member(s) added, $3 member(s) removed.
aepedia-csv-columns-hint: Select one or more columns that contain email addresses.
aepedia-csv-filter-hint: Rows matching any filter will be excluded from the import.
